name: Tracing LLM Behavior to the Training Data with Empirical Next-Token Distributions
summary: arXiv:2607.14306v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: In this paper, we study the connection between an LLM's output distribution and the data used to train it. Specifically, we study the degree to which...
description: arXiv:2607.14306v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: In this paper, we study the connection between an LLM's output distribution and the data used to train it. Specifically, we study the degree to which an LLM's next-token distribution agrees with the empirical next-token distribution (ENTD) given the context in the training data. The ENTD is an appealing target because it is the unrestricted global...
author: Zachary Izzo
